privileged_info_summary: Maria Santos is a synthetic female patient in the Oscar EMR demo environment (Synthea-style Canadian patient data). The task requires creating a clinical reminder with the message containing 'HbA1c', priority set to High, service date 14 days from task start, and assigned to provider oscardoc (Dr. Sarah Chen, provider_no 999998). Login credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. CRITICAL DATA DISCREPANCY: Task metadata claims patient DOB is 1978-06-12, but the actual seed data shows Maria Santos was born 1994-04-27.
